goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: La manzana es roja.
Mapa estructural: [The] + [NOUN] + [BE] + [ADJECTIVE]. Foco: is.
Ejemplos: The apple is red today. / La manzana es roja hoy. | The book is heavy. / El libro es pesado.

goldenSentences.context: It is John's apple on the table.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Eso es Juan-su manzana.
Mapa estructural: [IT] + [BE] + [OWNER]s + [THING]. Foco: John's.
Ejemplos: It is John's apple on the table. / Es la manzana de Juan en la mesa. | It is Maria's book. / Es el libro de Maria.

goldenSentences.front: Le doy la manzana a Juan.
goldenSentences.context: I give John the apple after lunch.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Yo doy Juan la manzana.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + [VERB] + [INDIRECT PERSON] + [DIRECT THING]. Foco: give.
Ejemplos: I give John the apple after lunch. / Le doy la manzana a Juan despues del almuerzo. | I give her the key. / Le doy la llave a ella.

goldenSentences.context: We give him the apple every Friday.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Nosotros damos el la manzana.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + [VERB] + [HIM/HER/THEM] + [THING]. Foco: give him.
Ejemplos: We give him the apple every Friday. / Le damos la manzana cada viernes. | They give her the report. / Le dan el reporte a ella.

goldenSentences.front: El se la da a Juan.
goldenSentences.context: He gives it to John before class.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: El da eso a Juan.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + [VERB] + [IT] + to + [NAME]. Foco: gives it to.
Ejemplos: He gives it to John before class. / El se la da a Juan antes de clase. | She sends it to Maria. / Ella se lo envia a Maria.

goldenSentences.front: Ella se la da a el.
goldenSentences.context: She gives it to him after the meeting.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Ella da eso a el.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + [VERB] + [IT] + to + [HIM]. Foco: gives it to him.
Ejemplos: She gives it to him after the meeting. / Ella se la da a el despues de la reunion. | He shows it to her. / El se lo muestra a ella.

Traduccion espejo: Es la manzana roja?
Mapa estructural: [BE] + [SUBJ] + [ADJECTIVE]?. Foco: is ... ?.
Ejemplos: Is the office open now? / Esta la oficina abierta ahora? | Are the apples fresh? / Estan frescas las manzanas?

goldenSentences.context: The apples are red and sweet.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Las manzanas son rojas.
Mapa estructural: [The] + [PLURAL NOUN] + [ARE] + [ADJECTIVE]. Foco: are.
Ejemplos: The apples are red and sweet. / Las manzanas son rojas y dulces. | The cars are ready. / Los carros estan listos.

goldenSentences.back: I must give it to him.
goldenSentences.context: I must give it to him today.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Yo debo dar eso a el.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + MUST + [BASE VERB] + [IT] + to + [HIM]. Foco: must.
Ejemplos: I must give it to him today. / Debo darsela hoy. | We must leave now. / Debemos salir ahora.

goldenSentences.back: I want to give it to her.
goldenSentences.context: I want to give it to her tomorrow.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Yo quiero a dar eso a ella.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + WANT + to + [BASE VERB] + [IT] + to + [HER]. Foco: want to.
Ejemplos: I want to give it to her tomorrow. / Quiero darsela manana. | They want to start now. / Quieren empezar ahora.

goldenSentences.context: I'm going to know tomorrow after I ask.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Yo estoy yendo a saber manana.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + AM/IS/ARE + going to + [BASE VERB] + [TIME]. Foco: going to.
Ejemplos: I'm going to know tomorrow after I ask. / Voy a saberlo manana despues de preguntar. | We're going to call later. / Vamos a llamar luego.

goldenSentences.context: I can't eat the apple right now.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Yo no-puedo comer la manzana.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + CANT + [BASE VERB] + [OBJECT]. Foco: can't.
Ejemplos: I can't eat the apple right now. / No puedo comer la manzana ahora. | She can't come today. / Ella no puede venir hoy.

goldenSentences.context: I have eaten the apple already.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Yo he comido la manzana.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + HAVE/HAS + [PAST PARTICIPLE] + [OBJECT]. Foco: have eaten.
Ejemplos: I have eaten the apple already. / Ya me he comido la manzana. | We have finished the task. / Hemos terminado la tarea.

Traduccion espejo: Haces tu gustar manzanas?
Mapa estructural: DO + [SUBJ] + [BASE VERB] + [OBJECT]?. Foco: do you.
Ejemplos: Do you like coffee too? / Te gusta tambien el cafe? | Do they need help? / Necesitan ayuda?

goldenSentences.context: I don't like the apple now.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Yo no-hago gustar la manzana.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + DONT + [BASE VERB] + [OBJECT]. Foco: don't.
Ejemplos: I don't like the apple now. / No me gusta la manzana ahora. | We don't have time. / No tenemos tiempo.

goldenSentences.context: I didn't eat the apple yesterday.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Yo no-hice comer la manzana.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + DIDNT + [BASE VERB] + [OBJECT]. Foco: didn't.
Ejemplos: I didn't eat the apple yesterday. / No me comi la manzana ayer. | He didn't call me. / El no me llamo.

Traduccion espejo: Yo estoy comiendo la manzana.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + AM/IS/ARE + [VERB-ING] + [OBJECT]. Foco: am eating.
Ejemplos: I'm eating the apple now. / Estoy comiendo la manzana ahora. | They are working today. / Ellos estan trabajando hoy.

goldenSentences.context: I've been eating apples all week.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Yo he estado comiendo manzanas.
Mapa estructural: [SUBJ] + HAVE/HAS + BEEN + [VERB-ING] + [OBJECT]. Foco: have been.
Ejemplos: I've been eating apples all week. / He estado comiendo manzanas toda la semana. | She has been studying all morning. / Ella ha estado estudiando toda la manana.

goldenSentences.back: If I had time, I would study.
goldenSentences.context: If I had time, I would rest.
goldenSentences.analysisEs:
Traduccion espejo: Si yo tenia tiempo, yo haria estudiar.
Mapa estructural: IF + [PAST FORM], [WOULD] + [BASE VERB]. Foco: if ... would.
Ejemplos: If I had time, I would rest. / Si tuviera tiempo, descansaria. | If we had money, we would travel. / Si tuvieramos dinero, viajariamos.
